name: The Lion King
description: Disney's 1994 animated classic — Simba, Mufasa, Scar, and the Circle of Life.

questions.q: What is the name of the lion cub hero of The Lion King?

source.notes: 'Simba' means 'lion' in Swahili.

questions.q: Who is Simba's father and the noble king of the Pride Lands?

source.notes: Voiced by James Earl Jones.

questions.q: Who is the villainous uncle and main antagonist of the film?

source.notes: Voiced by Jeremy Irons.

questions.q: What phrase, meaning 'no worries,' is Timon and Pumbaa's motto?

source.notes: Swahili for 'no worries.'

questions.q: What is the iconic rock formation that serves as the lions' royal seat?

source.notes: Depicted in the iconic opening and closing shots.

questions.q: Who are the best friends Simba finds in the jungle after his exile?

source.notes: A meerkat and a warthog.

questions.q: Who is Simba's childhood friend and future queen?

source.notes: Grown Nala voiced by Moira Kelly.

questions.q: Which sage baboon shaman anoints the newborn Simba in the opening scene?

source.notes: Actually a mandrill, though called a baboon in the film.

questions.q: What species of scavengers serve as Scar's loyal henchmen?

source.notes: Shenzi, Banzai, and Ed are the three main hyenas.

questions.q: Who composed the film's Oscar-winning score?

source.notes: Won Best Original Score at the 1995 Oscars.

questions.q: Which pop legend wrote the music for the film's songs alongside lyricist Tim Rice?

source.notes: The pair also wrote Aida for Broadway.

questions.q: Which song opens the film and accompanies Simba's presentation to the Pride Lands?
choices: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
Can You Feel the Love Tonight

source.notes: Oscar-nominated; features Lebo M's Zulu chant.

questions.q: Which Lion King song WON the 1995 Oscar for Best Original Song?
choices: Can You Feel the Love Tonight

source.notes: All three Best Song nominees that year were from The Lion King.

questions.q: Who voices adult Simba in the 1994 film?

source.notes: Young Simba was voiced by Jonathan Taylor Thomas.

questions.q: Who voices Timon the meerkat?

source.notes: Nathan Lane; Ernie Sabella voices Pumbaa.

questions.q: Which English actor voices Zazu, Mufasa's hornbill majordomo?

source.notes: Atkinson of Mr. Bean and Blackadder.

questions.q: Which Shakespeare play is widely cited as The Lion King's primary inspiration?

source.notes: Brother kills brother, son returns to avenge — Hamlet's throughline.

questions.q: The Lion King became a smash stage musical on Broadway in which year?

source.notes: Opened November 13, 1997 at the New Amsterdam Theatre.

questions.q: Which director and costume designer staged the Broadway version?

source.notes: Taymor won two Tonys for the production.

questions.q: Which two Disney animators are credited as the film's directors?

source.notes: Don Hahn produced.

questions.q: Who voices the villainous Scar in the 1994 film?

source.notes: Jim Cummings partially sings 'Be Prepared' after Irons strained his voice.

questions.q: The 2019 photorealistic remake of The Lion King was directed by whom?

source.notes: Favreau previously directed Disney's 2016 Jungle Book remake.
